title: Fort Yukon Mod
description: Based on Fort Yukon and my Songs by Al0046 like Jatter Oger Beatbox Edition!
body:
![Fort Yukon Mod 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/044a0b2b5f5311f39cf58b6ff84a5281200a25ce.png)
![Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5e29951029ba29b362a60dec1ddc82326b50516.png)![Forge 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80383a6f12e9aece4e80801f3ae29b8f95ca108e.png)![CURSEFORGE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f9003b4ac1497267a1a2b1b6e24506e0365ba44.png)
**[CURSEFORGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fort-yukon-mod)**

Based on Fort Yukon and my Songs by Al0046 like Jätter Oger Beatbox Edition!



**Fort Yukon Mod!**
_(For Forge/Fabric Now on Modrinth!)_
CRASHING FIXED UPDATE TO VERSION 0.3 OR NEWER VERSION TO FIX! ᕯ ↓
<details>
<summary>Another Risk</summary>

Risk for corruption in your world when updating to Beta 0.11 Version of the Mod because I wanted to rename the Mod ID from "TutorialMod" to "FortYukon". I recommend making a new world for the new versions since I will not change the Mod ID anymore!

</details>

_I might make a new mod named 'Fort Yukon Adventures' as is a good option to put stuff I want in Minecraft._

**Requires Minecraft Version 1.20.1 on Forge or 1.20.1-4 on Fabric and requires these mods**:
TerraBlender (For Forge) TerraBlender-forge-1.20.1-3.0.1.4.jar  or FabricAPI (For Fabric) Fabric-API-0.97.1+1.20.4.jar (Dependency)
✅ Compatible With:

➤ Just Enough Items (JEI) (For Forge) jei-1.20.1-forge-15.3.0.4.jar or Roughly Enough Items (REI) (For Fabric) rei-1.20.1-fabric-15.3.0.4.jar (Soft Dependency)

Welcome to Fort Yukon Mod! My first Mod made with a tutorial!

**Features**

Adds new Sapphire Tools, Armor, as well you can get Sapphire from the gem polisher. You can get diamonds from coal from the gem polisher! It also adds many songs made by me.

Family Friendly & Funny

This Mod is for friends and everyone! Just for fun!

**Examples**
![Jätter Oger Beatbox Music Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daf0c712cec5619f5a2b82bb83ed4426543adec9.png)
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/116fb5f694a34be5ecaa52a890a1f44cbfa48590.png)
